request.description: Login with username and password. Returns JWT token.
Logout current user. Client should discard token.
Get current authenticated user info.
Get all users with pagination and filters. Admin only.
Get user by ID. Admin only.
Create a new user. Admin only.
Update an existing user. Admin only.
Delete a user (soft delete). Admin only. Cannot delete self.
Get all medicine categories with pagination and search.
Get medicine category by ID.
Create a new medicine category.
Update a medicine category.
Delete a medicine category (soft delete). Cannot delete if medicines are linked.
Get all equipment categories with pagination and search.
Get equipment category by ID.
Create a new equipment category.
Update an equipment category.
Delete an equipment category (soft delete). Cannot delete if equipment items are linked.
Get all medical device categories with pagination and search.

item.name: Get Medical Device Category by ID

request.description: Get medical device category by ID.
Create a new medical device category.
Update a medical device category.
Delete a medical device category (soft delete). Cannot delete if medical devices are linked.
Get all medicines with pagination, filters, and search.
Get medicine by ID. Includes inventory quantity and category name.
Create a new medicine. Auto-creates inventory record with quantity 0.
Update a medicine.
Delete a medicine (soft delete). Only allowed if inventory quantity is 0.
Get all equipment with pagination, filters, and search.
Get equipment by ID. Includes inventory quantity and category name.
Create new equipment. Auto-creates inventory record with quantity 0.
Update equipment.
Delete equipment (soft delete). Only allowed if inventory quantity is 0.
Get all medical devices with pagination, filters, and search.
Get medical device by ID. Includes inventory quantity and category name.
Create a new medical device. Auto-creates inventory record with quantity 0.
Update a medical device.
Delete a medical device (soft delete). Only allowed if inventory quantity is 0.
Get all inventory records with pagination and filtering.
Get inventory record by ID.
Get inventory record by item type and item ID. item_type: medicine, equipment, medical_device.
Get all third parties. Read-only. Filters: type (user/doctor/patient/partner), is_active. Records created automatically when creating users, doctors, patients, or partners.
Get third party by ID.
Get all partners with pagination, filters, and search. Filters: partner_type (donor/referral/both), organization_type (NGO/organization/individual/hospital/medical_center), is_active.
Get partner by ID. Includes donations summary (if donor) and treatments (if referral).
Create a new partner. partner_type: donor, referral, both. organization_type: NGO, organization, individual, hospital, medical_center.
Update a partner.
Delete a partner (soft delete).
Get all doctors with pagination, filters, and search. Filters: type (internal/external/partner_provided), is_active, partner_id.
Get doctor by ID. Includes partner name if partner_provided.
Create an internal doctor (clinic staff).
Create a partner-provided doctor. Requires partner_id.
Update a doctor.
Delete a doctor (soft delete).
Get all patients with pagination, filters, and search. Filters: is_active, gender (male/female). Search: first_name, last_name, phone, email.
Get patient by ID. Use with_documents=true to include documents.
Create a new patient. Auto-creates a third_party record (type: patient) if third_party_id not provided.
Update a patient.
Delete a patient (soft delete).
Returns all available patient document types with value and human-readable label.
List all documents for a patient. Filter by document_type. Each item includes a presigned file URL (5 min expiry).
Get document by ID. Returns a presigned file URL (5 min expiry) for download.

formdata.description: Optional custom display name. If omitted, uses the original filename.

request.description: Upload a document for a patient. Accepts multipart/form-data. document_name and document_type are optional. The file_url in the response is a presigned URL (5 min expiry) that uses the document_name for the download filename.
Delete a patient document (soft delete). Also removes file from storage.

Get all appointments with pagination, filters, and search. Filters: patient_id, doctor_id, partner_id, status (scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled), type (scheduled/walk_in), location (internal/external), appointment_date.
Get appointment by ID. Includes vital signs and medical record.
Create a new appointment. External appointments require partner_id.
Update an appointment. Cannot update completed appointments.
Update appointment status. Values: scheduled, in_progress, completed, cancelled.
Delete an appointment (soft delete).
Get vital signs for an appointment. One vital signs record per appointment.
Add vital signs to an appointment. One record per appointment. All fields optional. Cannot add to completed appointments.
Update vital signs. Cannot edit if appointment is completed.
Delete vital signs (soft delete).
List all medical records with pagination and filters. Filters: patient_id, appointment_id.
Get medical record by ID. Includes patient name.
Get the medical record for a specific appointment.
Create a medical record for an appointment. One record per appointment. Cannot add to completed appointments.
Update a medical record. Cannot edit if appointment is completed.
Delete a medical record (soft delete).
List all treatments with pagination and filters. Filters: patient_id, partner_id, appointment_id, status (pending/completed).
Get treatment by ID. Includes patient and partner names.
Create a new treatment. Partner must have partner_type of 'referral' or 'both'. appointment_id is optional. Multiple treatments can be linked to one appointment.
Update a treatment.
Update treatment status. Values: pending, completed.
Delete a treatment (soft delete).

List all inventory transactions with pagination and filters. Filters: transaction_type (purchase/donation/prescription/loss/breakage/expiration/destruction), third_party_id, transaction_date. Sortable fields: id, transaction_type, transaction_date.
Get inventory transaction by ID. Includes transaction items with item names.
Create a purchase transaction. third_party_id is auto-set to the current user's third_party. Items are optional and can be added later.
Create a donation transaction. third_party_id is required and must point to a partner with partner_type of 'donor' or 'both'.
Create a prescription transaction. third_party_id is required and must point to a doctor. Decreases inventory automatically.
Update an inventory transaction. Only transaction_date and notes can be updated.
Delete an inventory transaction (soft delete). Reverses inventory changes.
List all items for a specific inventory transaction.
Add an item to an existing inventory transaction. item_type can be: medicine, equipment, medical_device. quantity must be greater than 0.
Update a transaction item. Can update item_type, item_id, and quantity. All fields are optional.
Delete a transaction item (soft delete). Reverses the inventory change for this item.
